## Checklist

- [ ] I ran my recipe end-to-end from a fresh virtual environment
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass locally
- [ ] I added/updated the recipe's `README.md` (inputs, outputs, sample run)
- [ ] `.env.example` lists all required variables with placeholder values (no real keys)
- [ ] This PR touches **one recipe** (or is a docs/tooling-only change)
